metadata.ea_instance: 8 (global EA-numbering convention per LA directive 2026-04-27 + feedback memory: Stage 1 = EA-1, Stage 2 = EA-2..EA-6, Stage 3 = EA-7, Stage 4 = EA-8)
metadata.stage_ea_chain_position: 1 (FIRST EA of the Stage 4 chain; chain re-numbers per stage but global EA-number persists)
metadata.predecessor_ea: Stage 3 EA instance 7 (retired correctly at Stage 3 close per Guide-#7 closure verdict via three-subagent convergence at devplatform 95884a0 + BlarAI c894ebd)
metadata.stage_risk: HIGH per Master Plan §6 (matched only by Stage 2). Single-session continuous-block cutover; rollback ladder is 4 levels per RECOVERY.md.
metadata.work_item_resume_at: 4.0.0 (NEW first-action sequence per g8-ea8_n1(e-part-0) + LA directive: VIKUNJA_TOKEN process-scope load → verify → git checkout -- .gitignore on devplatform → verify clean tree → proceed with Item 4.0). Then Item 4.0 (NARROWED per g8-ea8_n2(a): vikunja_mcp-only kill; verify LA prep-2 honored; preserve EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session), 4.0.5 (worktree gate), 4.0.6 (fleet-paused re-verify on absolute path), 4.1 (LA-decided 6-step DB location verification + config absolutization per g8-ea8_n1(c)), 4.2 (post-startup verification triad per g8-ea8_n1(d)), 4.3 (Vikunja project enumerate REST per g8-ea8_n1(e)), 4.4 (Claude Desktop MCP repointing + filesystem expansion + trustedFolders expansion per g8-ea8_n1(f)+(o)+(p)), 4.5 + 4.6 (VS Code + Claude Code MCP repointing per g8-ea8_n1(g)), 4.6.5 (bridge daemon start), 4.7 (scheduled-task XML rewrite with shape-aware arg-injection + S4U paste-relay carve-out per g8-ea8_n1(h) Steps 1/2/3/5/6 + g8-ea8_n2(c) Step 4 refinement), 4.7.5 (wake-template rewrite with forward-slash siblings per g8-ea8_n1(i)), 4.7.6 (PS1 line-by-line scan), 4.7.7 (Vikunja autostart enumerate with noise suppression per g8-ea8_n1(j)), 4.8 (per-task enable verify), 4.8.v2 (task count = 13 verify), 4.9 (Startup .lnk + .vbs rewrite per g8-ea8_n1(k)), 4.10 (bridge re-verify), 4.11a (EA-8 scriptable smoke per g8-ea8_n1(l)) [4.11b deferred LA manual smoke], 4.12 (commits with allow-list staging per g8-ea8_n1(m)), 4.13 (STATUS.md append), 4.13.5 (devplatform-path resume_fleet per g8-ea8_n1(n)).
metadata.prepared_by: Guide instance 8 (successor to Guide instance 7 per Guide-#7 closing handoff at 2026-04-28T01:30:00Z; instance 8 Variant B comprehension gate completed before authoring this pointer; Guide-#8 also authored the Stage 4.0.v2 pre-flight audit checkpoint base verdict + supplement-1 + supplement-2 before this pointer revision)
metadata.prepared_at_utc: 2026-04-28T00:00:00Z (revision: same-day amendment-fold-in per LA workflow-simplification directive)
metadata.head_at_initiation: BlarAI HEAD chain: 9d5fcd8 (original init pointer) → 13231f0 (supplement-2 + revised init pointer; 9 commit-hash placeholder tokens unfilled at commit-time per chicken-and-egg) → backfill commit (this commit; the 9 placeholder tokens replaced with `13231f0` literal; spawn-time HEAD; recover actual hash via `git log --oneline -1`). Prior init pointer commit at 9d5fcd8 SUPERSEDED by the supplement-2 same-commit revision per LA workflow-simplification directive. devplatform 95884a0 (Stage 3 single-commit close; UNCHANGED through pre-flight audit + verdict commits + revisions per docs-only discipline).
metadata.last_la_commit: none post-init-pointer-revision (LA's last commit was b9a173d the Guide-#7→Guide-#8 handoff; subsequent commits 2c6be78, 134e17a, 9d5fcd8, 13231f0 were Guide-#8 docs-only commits with LA explicit approval gate per stop-and-wait pattern)
metadata.last_ea_commit: None for EA-8 (this is EA-8's spawn pointer; no EA-8 commits exist yet). Last EA-7 commit: c894ebd (Stage 3.10 closure verified via three-subagent convergence; STATUS.md append). Stage 3 substantive commit on devplatform: 95884a0 (single Stage-3 commit; 189 files / +39592 -2; parent 3894221).

stage_3_close_anchors.anchor: devplatform 95884a0 — Stage 3 single substantive commit (189 files / +39592 -2 / parent 3894221).
BlarAI 76f6050 — Stage 3 close STATUS append (+59/-5; 6-item Stage 3 Closure Footnotes section + Anomalies A12/A13/A14 + Stage Ledger Stage 3 PENDING → COMPLETE).
BlarAI c894ebd — Stage 3.10 close VERIFIED via three-subagent convergence.
BlarAI b9a173d — LA's commit of GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml (Guide-#7 to Guide-#8 handoff brief).
BlarAI 2c6be78 — Stage 4.0.v2 pre-flight audit checkpoint base verdict (Guide-#8 commit; 14 amendments bound under g8-ea8_n1(a-n)).
BlarAI 134e17a — Stage 4.0.v2 supplement-1 (Guide-#8 commit; 3 LA-relayed findings bound; g8-ea8_n1 expanded to 16 sub-clauses (a-p)).
BlarAI 9d5fcd8 — Stage 4 EA-8 init pointer ORIGINAL (Guide-#8 commit; 907 lines; SUPERSEDED by this revision).

BlarAI 13231f0 — Stage 4.0.v2 supplement-2 (Guide-#8 commit; 6 amendments bound under g8-ea8_n2(a-f); LA workflow simplification: narrowed Item 4.0 kill + paste-relay carve-out at 4.7) + this revised init pointer (folds in n2 amendments).

metadata.resume_at_action: Item 4.0.0 (NEW; LA-prescribed 5-step first-action sequence per Guide-#8 supplement-1 §init_pointer_first_action_directive). Then Item 4.0 of the Stage 4 XML (NARROWED per g8-ea8_n2(a): vikunja_mcp-only kill + verify LA prep-2 honored). Stage 4 is HIGH risk; single-session continuous-block; rollback at 4 levels per RECOVERY.md.
metadata.nature_of_this_file:
Bootstrap pointer prepared by Guide instance 8 for the Lead Architect (LA) to attach when spawning a fresh EA chat for Stage 4 EA-8. This file does NOT introduce new procedural instructions — it points at: - The locked Stage 4 XML (`05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml`) - The Stage 4.0.v2 audit chain: base verdict at commit 2c6be78 + supplement-1 at commit 134e17a + supplement-2 at commit 13231f0 + audit-subagent evidence MD - The Stage 3 audit chain (Guide-#7 verdicts at temp_for_responses/3.* + Stage 3 init pointer) - The Stage 2 audit chain (5 EA mid-stage handoff XMLs at ea_outputs/, 9 Guide-#5 + 16 Guide-#6 disposition files at temp_for_responses/, EA initialization pointers EA-3/4/5/6) - The cumulative-ack inheritance chain (77 ack labels total; 70 prior + g7-ea7_n14 + g8-ea8_n1 + g8-ea8_n2)
All actual procedural authority lives in those source files; this pointer enumerates IDs + status flags + source citations + the new bindings (g7-ea7_n14 + g8-ea8_n1 + g8-ea8_n2 inline verbatim since Guide-#8 authored them).
Per LA workflow-simplification directive (2026-04-28): the standalone-PowerShell + paste-relay-for-hours workflow originally encoded in g8-ea8_n1(a) and the original init pointer at 9d5fcd8 was REJECTED as over-engineered. Replaced with: (1) Item 4.0 NARROWED to vikunja_mcp-only kill per g8-ea8_n2(a); (2) EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode natively per g8-ea8_n2(b)+(e); (3) Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out only at `Agents Cadence Monitor` per g8-ea8_n2(c) — one paste-relay total, not hours. This revised init pointer folds in those n2 amendments.
Cumulative-ack chain summary post-supplement-2: 77 ack labels (was 76); 104 binding atoms (was 98). Sub-clause additions: g8-ea8_n2(a-f) added since supplement-1.
EA-numbering naming-convention reminder (per Anomaly A12 + LA directive 2026-04-27): legacy `g7-ea1_n*` labels in committed Stage 3 verdicts preserved verbatim per no-amend doctrine. First verdict to use corrected `ea7` global naming: g7-ea7_n14. EA-8 emits new acks under `g8-ea8_n*` namespace.

ea_initiation.identity:
You are Stage 4 Executor Agent (EA) instance 8 — globally EA-8 per the global EA-numbering convention; locally the FIRST EA of the Stage 4 chain. Stage 4 is HIGH risk per Master Plan §6 — matched only by Stage 2. The comprehension-gate block at the top of `05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml` is mandatory: present a structured comprehension summary AND restate every binding acknowledgment verbatim (per `required_acknowledgments` block below), then STOP and WAIT for Guide instance 8 review before any edits, branches, file copies, or commands.
Stage 4 hard invariants (LA-locked; non-negotiable): - **Single-session continuous-block execution.** One EA-8 chat session covers Items 4.0.0 through 4.13.5. No mid-stage handoff; no resume across sessions. If context budget threatens mid-Stage-4, STOP and request LA disposition. - **Push-through-or-rollback semantics.** Once Item 4.1 begins (DB integrity + config absolutization), the path is forward to 4.13.5 success OR back via the 4-level rollback ladder. No "pause and continue tomorrow". - **No merge to main during Stage 4** (gated to Stage 5.10 with explicit LA approval per R10). - **Fleet stays paused until Item 4.13.5 Step 2** (then resumed on devplatform path only per g8-ea8_n1(n)). - **13/13 fleet tasks remain Disabled until Item 4.8 enables them one at a time.** - **All MCP repointing happens before bridge daemon start (4.6.5) before scheduled task enable (4.7-4.8)** — ordering is load-bearing per R7. - **DB stays at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Vikunja\\.** No DB migration to devplatform/tools/vikunja/. devplatform's config.yml is absolutized at Item 4.1 to make path explicit (per LA architectural decision 2026-04-28 bound in g8-ea8_n1(c)). - **Item 4.0 NARROWED kill** (per g8-ea8_n2(a)): only vikunja_mcp python processes. Claude Desktop + other VS Code workspaces are LA-closed pre-spawn (prep-2). EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session is preserved.
The LA's "mature not minimal" mandate (per feedback memory + Guide-#7/#8 inheritance) applies throughout Stage 4: thoroughness wins over speed. Every Class D ("cosmetic") finding bound in g8-ea8_n1 + g8-ea8_n2 is REQUIRED, not optional.
EA-7's procedural track record across Stage 3 (selective tools/+docs/ scope per g7-ea1_n11; selective governance per g7-ea1_n12; 8 sub-clause Stage 3.X audit checkpoint per g7-ea1_n13; Stage 3.10 closure verified via three-subagent convergence) is the discipline standard you inherit.

surface_specific_directives_for_ea_8.intro: EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot Chat with Claude Opus 4.7, AGENT MODE. The integrated terminal is the canonical execution surface for all Stage 4 commands. EA-8 invokes PowerShell commands directly through the integrated terminal (no paste-relay to a separate shell except for the n2(c) Item 4.7 S4U carve-out where on-demand elevated PowerShell is required for that one task).

tool_surface.available: - Read tool (file inspection) - Edit tool (in-place file modification) - Write tool (new file creation) - Terminal: PowerShell (Windows; canonical for Stage 4) AND Bash (Unix-style; available) - Git via terminal (status, log, diff, add, commit, checkout, branch) - REST via Invoke-RestMethod (PowerShell) — REQUIRED for Item 4.3 Vikunja query post-Item-4.0 vikunja_mcp kill (MCP server processes terminated; REST is the only path) - mcp__vikunja__* tools — AVAILABLE before Item 4.0; UNAVAILABLE between Item 4.0 (vikunja_mcp kill) and Item 4.11a (smoke). EA-8 must NOT assume MCP availability post-Item-4.0.
tool_surface.not_available: - Agent tool / subagent spawning. Guide-#8 (in Claude Code) handles subagents (e.g., Stage 4 close three-subagent verification triad). EA-8 does NOT spawn subagents during Stage 4. - Guide-style multi-file orchestration. EA-8 executes the Stage 4 work plan directly + reports back; Guide-#8 reviews + dispositions.

surface_specific_directives_for_ea_8.item_4_0_narrowed_kill_per_n2_a:
**Per g8-ea8_n2(a) (supersedes the original Stage 4 XML Item 4.0 spec command + the original init pointer's pragmatic interpretation):** - Verifies LA prep-2 attestation (Get-Process Claude empty) - Kills only vikunja_mcp python processes via Get-CimInstance Win32_Process (releases file locks for Items 4.4-4.6 MCP repointing) - Does NOT touch Claude/Code processes (LA pre-closed those per prep-2) - EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session stays alive throughout — that's the entire point of n2
The Stage 4 XML's literal Item 4.0 `Get-Process -Name "Claude","Code" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force` is REPLACED by the n2(a) narrowed kill block. EA-8 runs the n2(a) version, NOT the spec's literal version.
surface_specific_directives_for_ea_8.item_4_7_s4u_paste_relay_carve_out_per_n: **Per g8-ea8_n2(c) (refines g8-ea8_n1(h) Step 4):** - For `Agents Cadence Monitor` only (the one S4U LogonType task in the 13-task fleet) - EA-8 detects non-elevated shell, emits the EXACT Unregister+Register block to LA chat, asks LA to run from on-demand elevated PowerShell, awaits LA paste-back of verify output, verifies, resumes per-task loop - One paste-relay total. All other 12 tasks at Item 4.7 + all of Items 4.8/4.9/4.10/4.11a/4.12/4.13/4.13.5 run in-process via VS Code Copilot integrated terminal - If EA-8 IS running elevated (LA optionally launched VS Code as Admin), the n2(c) guard's `if (-not $isAdmin)` doesn't trigger; Unregister/Register runs in-process. Paste-relay is the FALLBACK, not the default.
surface_specific_directives_for_ea_8.implication_summary: EA-8 surface = VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode + integrated terminal. No standalone PowerShell. No paste-relay-for-hours. Stage 4 work runs natively through Copilot. Single tactical paste-relay at Item 4.7 for the S4U Agents Cadence Monitor task (and only if EA-8's shell is non-elevated).

required_reading_order.intro: EA-8 reads in this order. Files 1-5 are LOAD-BEARING for first-action work; files 6-13 are reference material for ack-chain restatement and Stage 4 risk awareness.
required_reading_order.doc: docs/platform_separation/05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml — the locked Stage 4 spec. Read cover-to-cover including ``, ``, every `` entry, ``, ``, ``. The spec is the procedural baseline; all g8-ea8_n1 + n2 sub-clauses are AMENDMENTS layered on top.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/4.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_8_STAGE4_PREFLIGHT_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml — base Guide-#8 verdict at commit 2c6be78. 14 amendments bound under g8-ea8_n1(a-n). EA-8 restates verbatim in iter-1 gate.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/4.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_8_SUPPLEMENT_TO_PREFLIGHT_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml — Guide-#8 supplement-1 at commit 134e17a. Adds 3 sub-clauses: g8-ea8_n1(e-part-0), n1(o), n1(p). Plus LA-relayed init-pointer first-action ordering directive. Plus DB-mechanism LA disposition affirming KEEP n1(c) absolutization. EA-8 restates verbatim.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/4.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_8_SUPPLEMENT_2_TO_PREFLIGHT_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml — Guide-#8 supplement-2 at commit 13231f0. Adds NEW ack g8-ea8_n2 with 6 sub-clauses (a-f): Item 4.0 NARROWING; n1(a) supersession; Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out; LA prep-3 reframing; surface directives update; iter-1 gate emit update. EA-8 restates verbatim.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/4.0.v2-AUDIT_SUBAGENT_OUTPUT_STAGE4_PREFLIGHT_DRIFT_INVENTORY.md — audit-subagent evidence MD (943 lines). Per-item findings, cross-cascades CC-1 through CC-8, residual risk acknowledgment. EA-8 reads for context (the `` blocks in this file are SUPERSEDED by g8-ea8_n1 + g8-ea8_n2 sub-clause text where they conflict; trust the verdicts, not the audit recommendations, for binding text).
docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md — current state through commit c894ebd (Stage 3 close). Stage Ledger rows 0/1/2/3, Anomalies A1-A14, Stage 2 + Stage 3 Closure Footnotes, Vikunja Project IDs.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml — Stage 3 init pointer (1618 lines). Authoritative source for the 61 predecessor acks (38 v4-era + 4 g6-ea5 + 10 g6-ea6 + 9 g7-ea1).

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml — Stage 3.10 closure verdict. Authoritative for g7-ea7_n14(a-d) verbatim text + rr1-rr7 forward-carry + f5_1-f5_4 forward-carry.
docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.10-GUIDE_HANDOFF_INSTANCE_7_TO_8.xml — Guide-#7 to Guide-#8 handoff brief. Procedural inheritance + LA preferences encoded.
docs/platform_separation/00_MASTER_PLAN.md — locked decisions §A-§F + §10 execution model + §11 v2 scope expansion.
docs/platform_separation/INFRA_DELTA_v2.md — v1→v2 delta. §1.4-1.7 (new tools), §2.1 (wake_launcher growth), §2.5 (13-task list), §3.1 (fleet-pause SOP), §3.3 (Vikunja label IDs).
docs/platform_separation/AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW.md — V1-V8 + R1-R12 + C1-C10 + M1-M10. Stage 4 §4 Cutover Atomicity Verdict.
docs/platform_separation/WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md — including Appendix A post-patch verification at commit 6a042ea. G-1 through G-4 + S-1, S-2.
docs/platform_separation/RECOVERY.md — 4-level rollback ladder. Stage 4 has its own 4-level rollback specifically.
docs/platform_separation/ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md — non-developer rollback guide. LA's "panic card" if Stage 4 fails catastrophically.

la_pre_prep_checklist.intro: Per Guide-#8 supplement-1 §init_pointer_first_action_directive + supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(d)" + dn29 (do NOT spawn EA-8 until LA pre-prep verification complete). Each item below has an attestation line; LA confirms completion in their EA-8 spawn message before EA-8 begins Item 4.0.0. EA-8's iter-1 comprehension gate INCLUDES a section confirming each LA attestation was provided.
la_pre_prep_checklist.attestation_item:
LA action: open Vikunja UI at http://localhost:3456 (Vikunja must be running for this; LA can briefly start it then stop again). User Settings → API Tokens → Create token with scope: read on Projects+Tasks. Copy token. Persist as User-scope env var: ```powershell [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('VIKUNJA_TOKEN', '<the-token-value>', 'User') ``` Verify in a fresh shell: ```powershell [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('VIKUNJA_TOKEN', 'User') # Expected: the token string (length should be ~43 per Guide-#8 Finding A relay) ``` Stop Vikunja again before EA-8 spawn so Stage 4 starts from a clean stopped state.
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-1] VIKUNJA_TOKEN created via Vikunja UI + persisted as User-scope env var; verified via fresh-shell GetEnvironmentVariable returns the token string."

LA action: close all OTHER AI development surfaces: - Claude Desktop application (right-click tray icon → Quit) - All OTHER VS Code workspaces (any window not running EA-8's chat) - All Claude Code terminals (close by typing `exit` or Ctrl+D)
PRESERVE: EA-8's own VS Code Copilot chat window stays open (EA-8 needs it to receive LA messages and emit its work).
Verify other surfaces closed: ```powershell Get-Process -Name "Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue # Expected: empty ```
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-2] Other AI surfaces closed. Only EA-8's VS Code Copilot session remains open. Get-Process Claude returned empty."
Note: per g8-ea8_n2(a), Item 4.0 verifies this attestation by Get-Process Claude empty check at execution time. If LA reopens Claude Desktop after spawn (e.g., for unrelated chat), Item 4.0 throws; LA must close Claude Desktop again before re-running Item 4.0.

LA action: confirm capability to launch an elevated PowerShell ON-DEMAND when EA-8 requests it at Item 4.7 paste-relay carve-out. LA does NOT need to keep an elevated shell open during the rest of Stage 4.
The on-demand action (when triggered at Item 4.7): 1. Press Win+X → "Windows PowerShell (Admin)" or "Terminal (Admin)" (or right-click Start Menu → same options) 2. Paste the EA-8-emitted Unregister+Register block (EA-8 will produce it explicitly) 3. Paste the result back to EA-8 chat 4. Close the elevated PowerShell
Verify capability (one-time, before EA-8 spawn): - Press Win+X. Confirm "Windows PowerShell (Admin)" or "Terminal (Admin)" option visible. - Right-click Start Menu. Confirm same options visible. - User account is part of Administrators group (verify via Control Panel → User Accounts).
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-3 REVISED] Elevated PowerShell on-demand capability confirmed. Win+X → Admin shell available. User in Administrators group."
EA-8 surface remains VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode throughout Stage 4. Elevation is a paste-relay-tactical action only at Item 4.7 (one task: Agents Cadence Monitor).

LA action: confirm Vikunja host process is stopped. ```powershell Get-Process -Name "vikunja*" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue # Expected: empty (no rows) ```
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-4] Vikunja host process stopped. Get-Process vikunja* returned empty."

LA action: block 4-12 hours of continuous availability. Once EA-8 begins Item 4.1, the path is push-through-or-rollback. Estimated execution time: 4-6 hours best case (clean run); 6-10 hours most likely (1-3 in-stage STOP cycles for compound drifts); 12-20 hours worst case if mid-stage rollback + retry.
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-5] Calendar blocked for the continuous block. No hard commitments in next 4-12 hours."

LA action: have RECOVERY.md (Stage 4 4-level rollback) + ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md (panic card) open in a separate window.
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-6] RECOVERY.md and ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md open in separate windows for emergency reference."

LA action: verify Stage 0 recovery anchors still intact: ```powershell Test-Path "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\BlarAI_pre_extract.bundle" Test-Path "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\blarai_oog_*.zip" (Get-ChildItem "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\scheduled_tasks_export\*.xml" | Measure-Object).Count # Expected: True; True; 13 ```
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-7] Backup anchors intact (bundle + OOG zip + 13 scheduled task XMLs)."
la_pre_prep_checklist.combined_attestation_template: The LA includes a single combined attestation block in the EA-8 spawn message: ``` LA pre-prep verified. Attestations: [ATTESTATION prep-1] VIKUNJA_TOKEN created + persisted; fresh-shell verify PASS. [ATTESTATION prep-2] Other AI surfaces closed; Claude.exe count = 0. [ATTESTATION prep-3 REVISED] Elevated PowerShell on-demand capability confirmed (Win+X Admin available; user in Administrators group). [ATTESTATION prep-4] Vikunja stopped; Get-Process vikunja* empty. [ATTESTATION prep-5] Calendar blocked 4-12h continuous. [ATTESTATION prep-6] RECOVERY.md + ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md open. [ATTESTATION prep-7] Backup anchors intact (bundle + OOG zip + 13 XMLs). Spawn EA-8. ``` EA-8's iter-1 comprehension gate confirms each `[ATTESTATION prep-N]` line was present in the spawn message.

ack_chain_carried_forward.intro:
All 77 unique-ID binding ack labels (61 from Stage 3 init pointer's chain + g7-ea7_n14 from Stage 3.10 closure verdict + g8-ea8_n1 from Stage 4.0.v2 audit base verdict + supplement-1 + g8-ea8_n2 from supplement-2) carry forward as audit chain inheritance. Sub-clause atomic count: 70 items + 8 (n13 a-h) + 4 (n14 a-d) + 16 (n1 a-p) + 6 (n2 a-f) = 104 binding atoms.
EA-8's iteration-1 comprehension gate restates each ack VERBATIM. For the 61 prior acks (Stage 3 init pointer chain): EA-8 reads `3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml` `` block (lines ~268-1199 approximately) and restates verbatim. For g7-ea7_n14(a-d), g8-ea8_n1(a-p), g8-ea8_n2(a-f): EA-8 restates verbatim from this file (inline below).
Status flags (extended for supplement-2): FORWARD-ACTIVE = enforce ongoing through Stage 4 close SATISFIED = closed at named item SATISFIED-AUDIT-HISTORY = SATISFIED with explicit audit-history retention FORWARD-ACTIVE-FIRST-ACTION = priority CRITICAL SUPERSEDED-BY-<ack_id> = the original ack is restated verbatim (no-amend doctrine) but EA-8 executes per the superseding ack REFINED-BY-<ack_id> = the original ack's specific portion is replaced; EA-8 executes per the refining ack at that portion
Naming-convention reminder (per Anomaly A12 + LA directive + memory feedback): legacy `g7-ea1_n*` labels in committed verdicts preserved verbatim. First verdict to use corrected `g7-ea7_n*` global naming: g7-ea7_n14. EA-8 emits g8-ea8_n*.

prior_61_ack_chain_reference.restate_verbatim_in_ea_8_iter_1_gate: Required. EA-8 reads the source file's `` block and restates each ack verbatim, preserving status flags + source citations.
prior_61_ack_chain_reference.high_priority_subset_for_stage_4: Of the 61 prior acks, the following are FORWARD-ACTIVE for Stage 4 specifics: - n=2 (fleet stays paused; NEVER state.resume_fleet) — extends through Item 4.13.5 Step 2 where state.resume_fleet IS called on devplatform path - n=3 (no merge to main) — gated to Stage 5.10 - n=4 (stash@{0} not popped/applied/dropped) - n=5 (no edits to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / copilot-instructions.md / governance docs) — V8 / Stage 6.1.v2 deferred - n=6 (Vikunja access through tools/_vikunja_client.py chokepoint; bool rejection) - n=8 (V8 defaults preservation: cwd-inside-BlarAI + no flags + no env → ctx.vikunja_project_id == 3) - g4-5 ($BLARAI_PID drift = STOP and report) — relevant at Item 4.7 preflight - g6-ea6_n8 (V4=1 Vikunja-running per Option B) — RESOLVED at Stage 4.0/4.1 preflight per rr6 (LA pre-stopped Vikunja per prep-4) - g7-ea1_n1 (VIKUNJA_PASS env-var pattern in MCP configs) — relevant at Items 4.4, 4.5, 4.6 - g7-ea1_n7 (no BlarAI-only docs in devplatform) — extends through Stage 5

new_g7_ea7_n14_from_stage_3_10_closure_v.ack: Source: `3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml` §subclause id="n14(a)". Title: Stage 4 EA-8 NEW forward-carry rr8 — gitignore working-tree cleanup preflight. EA-8 disposition: encoded in Item 4.0.0 first-action sequence Step 3 (devplatform .gitignore cleanup) + Step 4 (verify clean tree).

Source: `3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml` §subclause id="n14(b)". Title: Stage 6.7.5 TICKET E scope expansion — 3 new sub-items. EA-8 disposition: enumerated in `` block; not actioned at Stage 4.

Source: `3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml` §subclause id="n14(c)". Title: Stage 4 init pointer requirement — rr1-rr8 + f5_1-f5_4 verbatim enumeration. EA-8 disposition: SATISFIED in this init pointer's `` and `` blocks.
Source: `3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml` §subclause id="n14(d)". Title: Stage 6.7.5 TICKET A enrichment. EA-8 disposition: enumerated in `` TICKET A.

new_g8_ea8_n1_acks_for_stage_4.intro: 16 sub-clauses bound by Guide-#8's Stage 4.0.v2 base verdict (commit 2c6be78) + supplement-1 (commit 134e17a). EA-8 restates each VERBATIM in iter-1 gate.
new_g8_ea8_n1_acks_for_stage_4.ack: Title: Item 4.0 EA-8-context preamble + self-termination preflight gate (CC-1). Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(a)". STATUS NOTE: g8-ea8_n2(b) SUPERSEDES n1(a). EA-8 restates n1(a) verbatim in iter-1 gate per no-amend doctrine on committed verdicts (n1(a) lives in base verdict at 2c6be78, not retroactively rewritten). EA-8 does NOT execute n1(a) self-termination preflight gate. EA-8 execution: SKIPPED. Item 4.0 runs the n2(a) NARROWED kill block instead (verifies LA prep-2 + kills only vikunja_mcp pythons). EA-8 stays in VS Code Copilot agent mode; no standalone PowerShell required.

Title: Item 4.0.6 absolute path on state.json fleet-pause gate command. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(b)". Verbatim: "AMENDMENT: substitute with absolute path to BlarAI's state.json (the authoritative pre-cutover gate; devplatform's contaminated copy is reset by n1(n) at Item 4.13.5): ```powershell python -c "import json; print('PAUSED' if json.load(open(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json'))['fleet_paused'] else 'RUNNING -- HALT')" ``` Expected: `PAUSED`. If `RUNNING -- HALT` returned, EA-8 STOPs and reports."

Title: Item 4.1 LA-DECIDED REWRITE — DB location verification + config absolutization. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(c)" (full 6-step PowerShell flow). EA-8 execution: replaces ENTIRE Item 4.1 spec flow with 6 steps (a-f): Stop verify; DB sha256 capture; SQLite integrity; Edit devplatform/tools/vikunja/config.yml database.path absolute; Start devplatform Vikunja + reachability; DB sha256 stability check.

Title: Item 4.2 reduced to post-startup verification triad. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(d)". EA-8 execution: (i) Confirm absolute-path DB; (ii) REST project count ≥ 10; (iii) DB sha256 stability at +5s.

Title: VIKUNJA_TOKEN handling — process-scope load (Part 0) + LA pre-flight checklist (Part 1) + Item 4.3 fresh-shell fallback (Part 2) + REST user/pass fallback (Part 3). Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(e)" (Parts 1, 2, 3) + supplement-1 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n1(e-part-0)" (Part 0). EA-8 execution: Part 0 runs as Step 1 of Item 4.0.0 first-action sequence. Part 2 + Part 3 run inside Item 4.3 if needed.

Title: Claude Desktop MCP config — enumerate all 3 BlarAI-coupled fields. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(f)". EA-8 execution: rewrite mcpServers.vikunja block (command + PYTHONPATH + VIKUNJA_PASS env-var); backup .pre_stage4_bak; verify no residual BlarAI inside vikunja block.

Title: VS Code + Claude Code MCP configs — explicit absolute-path + PYTHONPATH rewrites. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(g)". EA-8 execution: rewrite BlarAI .vscode/mcp.json (top-level `servers`) + BlarAI .mcp.json (top-level `mcpServers`); preserve top-level keys per file; backup .pre_stage4_bak.

Title: Item 4.7 shape-aware arg-injection + absolute python path + S4U handling (CC-4). Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(h)". STATUS NOTE: Steps 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 of n1(h) UNCHANGED. Step 4 (S4U guard hard-throw) REFINED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(c) (paste-relay carve-out). EA-8 restates n1(h) verbatim in iter-1 gate per no-amend doctrine. EA-8 execution: Steps 1, 2, 3 (BOM strip + path substitutions + bare-WorkingDirectory rewrite + shape-aware arg-injection per Pattern A python-module / Pattern B powershell-script) per n1(h). Step 4 (S4U handling) per n2(c) paste-relay carve-out (NOT the original n1(h) Step 4 hard-throw). Steps 5, 6 (post-rewrite verify; LA elevated-shell carve-out) per n1(h).
Title: Wake-template path-rewrite — forward-slash sibling patterns. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(i)".
Title: Vikunja autostart enumeration — suppress noise + tighten regex. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(j)".
Title: Vikunja Startup .lnk — widen gate + rewrite .vbs content. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(k)".
Title: End-to-end smoke split into EA-8 scriptable + LA manual. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(l)".
Title: Commit hygiene — gitignore augmentation + allow-list staging. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(m)".
Title: Resume fleet — two-step reset+resume on devplatform path. Source: base verdict §subclause id="n1(n)". Function-name reminder: `state.resume_fleet`, NEVER `state.unpause_fleet`.
Title: Claude Desktop filesystem MCP server — extend args to include devplatform. Source: supplement-1 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n1(o)".
Title: Claude Desktop trustedFolders — extend to include devplatform. Source: supplement-1 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n1(p)".

new_g8_ea8_n2_acks_for_stage_4.intro: 6 sub-clauses bound by Guide-#8's Stage 4.0.v2 supplement-2 (commit 13231f0). LA workflow-simplification: rejected the standalone-PowerShell + paste-relay-for-hours workflow encoded in n1(a) and the original init pointer at 9d5fcd8. EA-8 restates each VERBATIM in iter-1 gate.
new_g8_ea8_n2_acks_for_stage_4.ack: Title: Item 4.0 NARROWING — vikunja_mcp-only kill; drop Claude/Code Stop-Process sweep. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(a)" (full 3-step PowerShell block). EA-8 execution: Step 1 verify LA prep-2 attestation honored (Get-Process Claude empty; throw if not); Step 2 kill only vikunja_mcp python processes via Get-CimInstance + Stop-Process per-PID; Step 3 verify post-kill (no vikunja_mcp pythons remain). DROPPED: spec's `Get-Process -Name "Claude","Code" | Stop-Process -Force` (CC-1 self-termination cascade source).

Title: Supersede g8-ea8_n1(a) — drop standalone-PowerShell requirement + descended-from-Claude/Code preflight gate. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(b)". EA-8 execution: SUPERSESSION authority. EA-8 does NOT run the n1(a) self-termination preflight gate. EA-8 runs Stage 4 entirely from VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode using integrated terminal. CC-1 cascade closed at kill-source per n2(a) instead of via shell isolation.

Title: Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out — refines g8-ea8_n1(h) Step 4. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(c)" (full PowerShell block + verify). EA-8 execution at Item 4.7 reaching `Agents Cadence Monitor`: detect non-elevated shell via WindowsPrincipal/IsInRole check; if non-elevated, emit explicit Unregister+Register+Disable+verify block to LA chat as paste-template; record PASTE_RELAY_PENDING state; pause per-task loop; chat returns to LA awaiting paste-back; on LA paste-back, verify pattern `'Agents Cadence Monitor.*Disabled.*S4U'` matches; if matched, mark SATISFIED and resume per-task loop with next task; if not matched, throw paste-relay verify FAIL. If EA-8 IS elevated, n2(c) Step 4 doesn't trigger — Unregister/Register runs in-process. One paste-relay total (only if non-elevated).

Title: Reframe LA pre-prep prep-3 — elevated PowerShell on-demand at Item 4.7, not throughout Stage 4. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(d)" (revised attestation language). EA-8 execution: SATISFIED in this revised init pointer's `` prep-3 attestation_item (revision="per_g8_ea8_n2_d"). EA-8's iter-1 gate `la_pre_prep_attestation_recap` confirms the REVISED prep-3 line.

Title: Update init pointer surface directives — VS Code Copilot agent mode is canonical execution surface. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(e)" (replacement directives content). EA-8 execution: SATISFIED in this revised init pointer's `` block (revision="2_per_g8_ea8_n2_e"). EA-8 uses VS Code Copilot agent mode + integrated terminal as canonical execution surface.

Title: Update init pointer iter-1 gate emission — drop standalone-PowerShell check; confirm VS Code Copilot agent mode + narrowed kill. Source: supplement-2 §subclause id="g8-ea8_n2(f)". EA-8 execution: SATISFIED in this revised init pointer's `` action 4 (`emit_iteration_1_comprehension_gate`). Iter-1 gate `comprehension_summary` block ADDS `part_g_surface_confirmation` field. V0m elevation check REMOVED from V0a-V0o block; renumbered to V0a-V0n (14 total checks; was 15).

ack_chain_carried_forward.ack_chain_summary:
Total ack labels: 77 (was 76 pre-supplement-2). Total binding atoms (sub-clauses expanded): 104 (was 98). - 38 v4-era (Stage 2 chain; per Stage 3 init pointer) - 4 g6-ea5 (Stage 2 Guide-#5 dispositions) - 10 g6-ea6 (Stage 2 Guide-#6 dispositions) - 9 g7-ea1 (Stage 3 Guide-#7 dispositions n1-n9) - 4 g7-ea1 (Stage 3.X amendments n10-n13; n13 has 8 sub-clauses) - 1 g7-ea7 (Stage 3.10 closure n14; 4 sub-clauses; FIRST corrected `ea7` naming) - 1 g8-ea8 (Stage 4.0.v2 base + supplement-1; n1; 16 sub-clauses) - 1 g8-ea8 (Stage 4.0.v2 supplement-2; n2; 6 sub-clauses; NEW)
EA-8 iter-1 gate restates: 61 prior acks verbatim from Stage 3 init pointer + 4 g7-ea7_n14(a-d) verbatim + 16 g8-ea8_n1(a-p) verbatim + 6 g8-ea8_n2(a-f) verbatim.

forward_carry_residual_risks_verbatim.intro: Per g7-ea7_n14(c) requirement: rr1-rr8 enumerated VERBATIM. Source: `3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml`.
forward_carry_residual_risks_verbatim.residual_risk_item: Runtime behavior of platform tools post-MCP-repointing. Stage 4 EA-8 SHALL run an end-to-end MCP smoke test from devplatform context post-repointing. Item 4.11a satisfies.

Cross-file consistency of path rewrites. Stage 4 EA-8 preflight SHALL grep `C:\\Users\\mrbla\\BlarAI\\` across `devplatform/.mcp.json` and `devplatform/.vscode/mcp.json` and assert zero matches. Items 4.4/4.5/4.6 verify-no-residual-blarai checks satisfy.
State.json contamination at devplatform. Stage 4 EA-8 disposition: Decision A (reset to clean baseline) per g8-ea8_n1(n) Step 1.
__pycache__ pollution. Stage 5 EA SHALL run `Remove-Item -Recurse devplatform/tools/**/__pycache__` before final verification.

Anomaly A3 — `Agents Cadence Monitor` S4U elevation requirement. Per g8-ea8_n2(c) paste-relay carve-out: if EA-8's shell is non-elevated, single paste-relay to LA's on-demand elevated PowerShell. If EA-8's shell IS elevated, in-process Unregister/Register.
Vikunja shutdown gate. PRE-RESOLVED — LA stopped Vikunja before Guide-#8 spawn. LA prep-4 attestation re-verifies. Item 4.1 Step (a) re-verifies defense-in-depth.
Worktrees-empty precondition. EA-8 disposition: Item 4.0.5 verifies.
devplatform working-tree drift (`M .gitignore` 7-line tail-block duplication). EA-8 disposition: Item 4.0.0 first-action sequence Steps 3+4.

forward_items_for_stage_5_verbatim.intro: Per g7-ea7_n14(c) requirement: f5_1-f5_6 enumerated VERBATIM.
forward_items_for_stage_5_verbatim.forward_item: F-N5/F-N6/F-N7 path drifts deferred to Stage 5 EA fresh-eyes.
Stage 5.1 chokepoint deletion requires concomitant test deletion (test_vikunja_client_scope.py, test_project_context.py).
Devplatform .gitignore vikunja.db patterns preservation through Stage 5 cleanup.
.pre_stage4_bak retention decision (recommend 14 days) at Stage 5 close.

stage_6_7_5_hardening_tickets.intro: 7 Stage 6.7.5 hardening tickets (A through G) currently OPEN. All REQUIRED per LA mature-not-minimal motto.
stage_6_7_5_hardening_tickets.ticket: Consolidated locked-artifact amendments: typos + spec drifts; EA-numbering rewrite (`g7-ea1_n*` → `g7-ea7_n*`); audit-evidence MD cross-references in STATUS Closure Footnotes (incl. 4.0.v2 audit MDs).

Stage 3.X audit-checkpoint posterity fold + 4 sub-items: (i) orphan VS Code task in devplatform/.vscode/tasks.json; (ii) copy_manifest_v2.yaml totals divergence notes; (iii) daily_digest --help text BlarAI staleness; (iv) co_lead_architect.md line 175 forward-slash state.json path.

Vikunja DB-path doctrine documentation. Partially pre-resolved by g8-ea8_n1(c) LA decision. Remaining: .vbs/.bat comments; RECOVERY.md Stage 4 rollback section; VERIFICATION_COMMANDS.md Stage 4 section; ADR.
Scheduled-task XML python.exe absolute-path migration as long-term doctrine (n1(h) closes immediate risk).

required_first_actions.action: Per `.github/copilot-instructions.md` §fleet_pause_sop: verify the fleet remains paused via the absolute-path command per g8-ea8_n1(b): ```powershell python -c "import json; print('PAUSED' if json.load(open(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json'))['fleet_paused'] else 'RUNNING -- HALT')" ``` Expected: `PAUSED`. Do NOT call `state.resume_fleet()` or `state.pause_fleet()` until Item 4.13.5 Step 2 (devplatform path per g8-ea8_n1(n)). Function-name reminder: `state.resume_fleet()` — NEVER `state.unpause_fleet()`.

Confirm each `[ATTESTATION prep-N]` line was present in the LA's EA-8 spawn message: - prep-1: VIKUNJA_TOKEN persisted User-scope - prep-2: Other AI surfaces closed - prep-3 REVISED: Elevated PowerShell on-demand capability confirmed (Win+X Admin available; Administrators group) - prep-4: Vikunja stopped - prep-5: Calendar blocked 4-12h - prep-6: RECOVERY.md + ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md open - prep-7: Backup anchors intact
If ANY attestation missing: STOP and request LA confirmation before proceeding.

Run V0a-V0n pickup verification block (14 checks; was 15 before n2(f) dropped V0m elevation since elevation is no longer required throughout Stage 4). Report all outputs in iter-1 gate. ON ANY V0 FAILURE: STOP. Report which V0 check failed with actual observed value vs expected.
`git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` → expected `chore/platform-extraction` `git log --oneline -5` → expected HEAD = the backfill commit (most recent commit on chore/platform-extraction at EA-8 spawn time; subsequent to 13231f0; recover actual hash via `git log --oneline -1`); parents 13231f0 (supplement-2 + revised init pointer) → 9d5fcd8 (original init pointer) → 134e17a (supplement-1) → 2c6be78 (base verdict) → b9a173d (Guide-#7→Guide-#8 handoff) `git status --porcelain` → expected empty (BlarAI clean) `git worktree list` → expected only main worktree `git stash list` → expected stash@{0}: "On main: wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002" — 13+-cycle preservation. DO NOT POP / APPLY / DROP. `python -c "import json; s=json.load(open(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json')); print(s['fleet_paused'], s['fleet_paused_reason'], s['last_updated_by'], s['last_updated_utc'])"` → expected `True "platform separation v2 in progress" copilot_agent 2026-04-24T20:46:12Z`. sha256 expected `71fc1a2f21177f2461a750d0239244e709cf1e228778c46a6e188cc50d2d5d19`. `cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git branch --show-current; git log --oneline -1` → expected `main`; HEAD `95884a0` `cd C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform; git status --porcelain` → expected ` M .gitignore` (rr8 known-and-dispositioned; cleaned at Item 4.0.0 Step 3) `Test-Path C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\.platform\vikunja_project_ids.yaml; Get-Content C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\.platform\vikunja_project_ids.yaml` → expected True; contents include `blarai_project_id: 3` `[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('VIKUNJA_TOKEN', 'User')` → expected token string ~43 chars (per LA prep-1). If empty: STOP and request LA re-do prep-1. `Get-Process -Name "vikunja*" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue` → expected empty (per LA prep-4) `Get-Process -Name "Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue` → expected empty (per LA prep-2) `(Get-ScheduledTask -TaskPath '\BlarAI\').Count; Get-ScheduledTask -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' | Where-Object {$_.State -ne 'Disabled'}` → expected 13; second command empty `Test-Path "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\BlarAI_pre_extract.bundle"; (Get-ChildItem "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\blarai_oog_*.zip").Count; (Get-ChildItem "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\scheduled_tasks_export\*.xml").Count` → expected True; 1; 13 (per LA prep-7)

Per the mandatory comprehension_gate at the top of `05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml`, emit iteration-1 comprehension gate as XML. Structure:
- meta block (stage_id=STAGE_4, ea_global_number=8, ea_stage_chain_position=1, iteration=1, branch=chore/platform-extraction, blarai_head=<backfill commit; the latest commit on chore/platform-extraction at iter-1 gate emission time; recover via `git log --oneline -1`>, devplatform_head=95884a0, predecessor_ea=stage_3_ea_7_retired, prepared_by_guide=Guide instance 8)
- la_pre_prep_attestation_recap (each `[ATTESTATION prep-N]` line confirmed; restate verbatim — note prep-3 is REVISED)
- pickup_verification_recap (V0a-V0n outputs from action 3)
- required_acknowledgments_carryforward_verbatim: * 61 prior acks restated VERBATIM from Stage 3 init pointer * 4 g7-ea7_n14(a-d) restated VERBATIM * 16 g8-ea8_n1(a-p) restated VERBATIM (n1(a) annotated SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b); n1(h) Step 4 annotated REFINED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(c)) * 6 g8-ea8_n2(a-f) restated VERBATIM Total: 77 ack labels (104 binding atoms with sub-clauses expanded). Each with status flag + source_file attribute.
- residual_risks_recap: * rr1-rr8 restated VERBATIM * f5_1-f5_6 restated VERBATIM * 7 Stage 6.7.5 hardening tickets (A-G) enumerated
- comprehension_summary: part_a_objective: complete Stage 4 cutover by repointing all MCP configs to devplatform; absolutizing devplatform Vikunja config; rewriting + re-enabling 13 scheduled tasks with shape-aware arg-injection + S4U paste-relay carve-out; rewriting Vikunja Startup .lnk + .vbs; smoke-testing devplatform-side MCP path; resetting devplatform state.json + resume_fleet; appending STATUS.md. Risk: HIGH. Single-session continuous-block. part_b_work_plan: enumerate Items 4.0.0, 4.0 (NARROWED per n2(a)), 4.0.5, 4.0.6, 4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4 (per n1(f)+(o)+(p)), 4.5/4.6, 4.6.5, 4.7 (per n1(h) + n2(c) Step 4), 4.7.5, 4.7.6, 4.7.7, 4.8, 4.8.v2, 4.9, 4.10, 4.11a [4.11b deferred], 4.12, 4.13, 4.13.5. part_c_files_to_modify_or_create: enumerate per work_plan_pointer below. part_d_verification_strategy: V0a-V0n COMPLETE; per-step verify per amended Item commands. part_e_risks: HIGH stage. Active risks: rr1, rr5 (now via paste-relay carve-out), CC-4 (closed by n1(h)+n2(c)), CC-5 (closed by n1(n)), CC-1 (closed by n2(a) narrowed kill). part_f_rollback_acknowledgment: verbatim "Stage 4 has 4-level rollback ladder per RECOVERY.md. I will NOT improvise rollback. If Item 4.11a smoke fails, do NOT execute Item 4.13.5 — fleet stays paused until rollback complete or fix-forward." part_g_surface_confirmation (NEW per g8-ea8_n2(f)): "Confirming EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode. Integrated terminal is the canonical execution surface for Stage 4 commands. Item 4.0 will use the g8-ea8_n2(a) NARROWED kill (verify LA prep-2 via Get-Process Claude empty + kill vikunja_mcp pythons via Get-CimInstance), NOT the spec's broader Stop-Process Claude,Code command. g8-ea8_n1(a) self-termination preflight gate is SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b) — EA-8 does NOT run that gate. Standalone PowerShell is NOT required for Stage 4 work; on-demand elevated PowerShell is required only at Item 4.7 paste-relay for Agents Cadence Monitor (S4U LogonType) per g8-ea8_n2(c)."
- stop_discipline: STOPPING. Awaiting Guide instance 8 review. No file edits, MCP repointing, scheduled task changes, .lnk/.vbs rewrites, commits, or fleet resume until explicit PROCEED authorization from Guide-#8.
Then STOP. Do not proceed to Item 4.0.0 work until Guide instance 8 reviews and approves iteration-1 gate.

ea_initiation.work_plan_pointer:
The Stage 4 XML is the procedural baseline; g8-ea8_n1(a-p) + g8-ea8_n2(a-f) sub-clauses are AMENDMENTS layered on top. Where spec text and amendment conflict, AMENDMENT WINS. Where spec text is unaffected, spec text governs.
Execution order (post-iter-1-APPROVAL):
Item 4.0.0 (NEW; per Guide-#8 supplement-1 §init_pointer_first_action_directive): Step 1 — Load VIKUNJA_TOKEN process-scope (per n1(e) Part 0). Step 2 — Verify the load. Step 3 — devplatform .gitignore cleanup (per rr8 / g7-ea7_n14(a)). Step 4 — Verify devplatform working tree clean. Step 5 — proceed with Item 4.0 of Stage 4 XML (NARROWED per n2(a)).
Item 4.0 (NARROWED per g8-ea8_n2(a)): Step 1 — verify LA prep-2 attestation honored: `Get-Process -Name "Claude"` → expected empty; throw if Claude.exe processes found. Step 2 — kill vikunja_mcp python processes via Get-CimInstance Win32_Process (filter Name='python.exe'; Where CommandLine match 'vikunja_mcp'); Stop-Process -Id per-PID. Step 3 — verify post-kill (no vikunja_mcp pythons remain). DROPPED from spec: `Get-Process -Name "Claude","Code" | Stop-Process -Force` (CC-1 cascade source). EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session preserved.
Item 4.0.5: re-verify worktrees-empty gate (BlarAI side). Spec command unchanged.
Item 4.0.6 (per g8-ea8_n1(b)): re-confirm fleet paused via absolute-path command.
Item 4.1 (LA-decided REWRITE per g8-ea8_n1(c)): execute the 6-step (a-f) flow verbatim from base verdict.
Item 4.2 (per g8-ea8_n1(d)): post-startup verification triad.
Item 4.3 (per g8-ea8_n1(e) Parts 0-3): Vikunja project enumerate REST. Token already loaded at Item 4.0.0 Step 1.
Item 4.4 (per g8-ea8_n1(f) + n1(o) + n1(p)): Claude Desktop MCP rewrite + filesystem expansion + trustedFolders expansion.
Item 4.5 (per g8-ea8_n1(g)): VS Code Copilot MCP config rewrite.
Item 4.6 (per g8-ea8_n1(g)): Claude Code MCP config rewrite.
Item 4.6.5: bridge daemon start. Spec command unchanged.
Item 4.7 (per g8-ea8_n1(h) Steps 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 + g8-ea8_n2(c) Step 4 refinement): Steps 1-3 per n1(h): UTF-16 BOM strip, path substitutions, bare-WorkingDirectory rewrite, shape-aware arg-injection (Pattern A python-module / Pattern B powershell-script). Step 4 per n2(c): for `Agents Cadence Monitor`, detect non-elevated; if non-elevated, emit paste-template to LA chat + record PASTE_RELAY_PENDING + pause per-task loop + await LA paste-back + verify pattern match + resume; if elevated, in-process Unregister/Register. Steps 5-6 per n1(h): post-rewrite verify + LA elevated-shell carve-out (now operationally satisfied via n2(c) paste-relay).
Item 4.7.5 (per g8-ea8_n1(i)): wake-template path rewrite with both backslash + forward-slash patterns.
Item 4.7.6 (no amendment): PS1 line-by-line scan over 5 scripts.
Item 4.7.7 (per g8-ea8_n1(j)): Vikunja autostart enumerate with -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue + tightened regex.
Item 4.8: per-task enable + verify (LastTaskResult=0). If `Agents Cadence Monitor` was paste-relayed at Item 4.7 (PASTE_RELAY_PENDING marked SATISFIED), it's already registered; Enable-AndVerify-Task can fire from in-process.
Item 4.8.v2: confirm task count = 13.
Item 4.9 (per g8-ea8_n1(k)): widened gate condition + 3 .lnk properties rewrite + start_vikunja_hidden.vbs content rewrite.
Item 4.10: bridge re-verify.
Item 4.11 (per g8-ea8_n1(l)): split into 4.11a (EA-8 scriptable smoke; STAGE 4 EXIT CRITERION) + 4.11b (LA manual smoke; deferred).
Item 4.12 (per g8-ea8_n1(m)): commits with explicit allow-list staging.
Item 4.13: STATUS.md append on BlarAI side.
Item 4.13.5 (per g8-ea8_n1(n)): two-step reset+resume on devplatform path.
Closing handoff to LA: emit per `` block.

stop_conditions.condition: If V0a-V0n pickup verification surfaces drift beyond the expected, STOP. Report which V0 check failed with actual vs expected.
If any LA pre-prep `[ATTESTATION prep-N]` line is missing, STOP and request LA confirmation. Do NOT proceed without all 7 attestations (note prep-3 is REVISED).
If Item 4.0.0 Step 1 VIKUNJA_TOKEN load returns empty AND `[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('VIKUNJA_TOKEN', 'User')` also returns empty, STOP. LA prep-1 was incomplete.
If Item 4.0.0 Step 4 verify clean tree FAILS, STOP. Investigate further drift before proceeding.
If Item 4.0 Step 1 (per n2(a)) finds Claude.exe processes still running (LA prep-2 not honored), STOP. Request LA close Claude Desktop before re-running Item 4.0.
If Item 4.0 Step 3 (per n2(a)) finds vikunja_mcp pythons still running post-kill, STOP. Investigate before continuing (file locks not released).
If Item 4.1 Step (e) Vikunja unreachable within 30s, STOP. Rollback per amended Item 4.1 rollback. Fleet stays paused.
If Item 4.2 (i) `tools/vikunja/vikunja.db` accidentally created at devplatform post-startup, STOP. Investigate Vikunja resolution behavior with LA.
If Item 4.2 (ii) project count below 10, STOP.
If Item 4.3 returns empty project list OR auth fails (Parts 0/1/2/3 fallbacks exhausted), STOP.
If Items 4.4/4.5/4.6 verify-no-residual-blarai check returns ANY match, STOP.
If Item 4.7 per-task verify FAILS (missing devplatform python OR missing project args/BlarAIRoot), STOP per-task. Do NOT proceed to Item 4.8 with partial fleet.

If Item 4.7 reaches `Agents Cadence Monitor` and EA-8 shell is non-elevated (per n2(c)), pause per-task loop + emit paste-template to LA. NOT a stop-condition; this is the n2(c) paste-relay carve-out — EA-8 awaits LA paste-back, verifies, resumes.
If Item 4.7 paste-relay verify FAILS (LA-pasted output does not match expected pattern `'Agents Cadence Monitor.*Disabled.*S4U'`), STOP. Request LA re-execution OR escalation to direct registration.
If Item 4.8 LastTaskResult ≠ 0 for any task, auto-disable that task. STOP if 2+ tasks fail.
If Item 4.9 widened gate finds NO candidate .lnk matching BlarAI references, STOP. Vikunja autostart .lnk SHOULD exist.
If Item 4.11a smoke test FAILS, STOP. Do NOT execute Item 4.13.5 — fleet stays paused.
If Item 4.12 git status post-stage shows unexpected files, STOP and selectively `git reset HEAD ` before commit.
If Item 4.13.5 verify Step 3 returns `True` (fleet still paused after resume), STOP.
If context budget tightens DANGEROUSLY mid-Stage-4, STOP and request LA disposition. Do NOT self-handoff.
If you discover any procedural defect mid-execution, STOP and report. NO inline-fix.
If any unexpected drift class surfaces beyond the 22 g8-ea8_n1 + n2 sub-clauses, STOP and report.

forbidden.prohibition: Do NOT merge chore/platform-extraction (BlarAI) to main during Stage 4. Merge gate is Stage 5.10 with explicit LA approval per R10.
Do NOT git stash pop / git stash apply / git stash drop on BlarAI's stash@{0}.
Do NOT edit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md (BlarAI side) or any A1-A14 governance doc. V8 / Stage 6.1.v2 deferred.

Do NOT call state.pause_fleet() or state.resume_fleet() at any point during Items 4.0.0 through 4.13.4. The ONLY authorized resume invocation is Item 4.13.5 Step 2 against the devplatform path per g8-ea8_n1(n). Function-name: `state.resume_fleet`, NEVER `state.unpause_fleet`.
Do NOT MOVE the Vikunja DB. Per LA architectural decision g8-ea8_n1(c): DB stays at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Vikunja\.
Do NOT spawn subagents. Stage 4 is single-session continuous-block; subagent capability is not part of the EA-8 surface. Guide-#8 handles subagents at Stage 4 close.
Do NOT mid-stage handoff. Stage 4 is single-session per Master Plan §10. If context tightens, STOP and request LA disposition.
Do NOT skip the LA pre-prep attestation verification (action 2). All 7 [ATTESTATION prep-N] lines must be present (note prep-3 is REVISED per n2(d)).
Do NOT skip Item 4.0.0 Steps 1-4 first-action sequence.

Do NOT run the spec's Item 4.0 `Get-Process -Name "Claude","Code" | Stop-Process -Force` command. Per g8-ea8_n2(a), this is NARROWED to vikunja_mcp-only kill. Running the spec's broader command would trigger CC-1 self-termination cascade for EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session.

Do NOT execute g8-ea8_n1(a) self-termination preflight gate. Per g8-ea8_n2(b): n1(a) is SUPERSEDED. EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot agent mode natively; no descended-from-Claude/Code parent check needed.
Do NOT inline-fix any spec defect or amendment defect mid-execution. Locked artifacts. Report to LA + Guide-#8 for verdict-cycle disposition.
Do NOT delete or modify the .pre_stage4_bak files created during Stage 4. Stage 4 rollback anchors. Stage 5 EA decides retention per f5_6.
Do NOT commit the Vikunja DB. Per g8-ea8_n1(m) gitignore augmentation.
Do NOT commit unauthorized files via bare `git add .`. Use explicit allow-list staging per g8-ea8_n1(m).
Do NOT use the audit-subagent's RECOMMENDED_DISPOSITION text directly where g8-ea8_n1 + n2 sub-clause text differs. Verdicts win.

Do NOT relabel binding acks with new IDs or reuse SATISFIED ack labels for new work. The 77-ack predecessor chain is fixed; only NEW g8-ea8_n3+ acks may be introduced via Guide-#8 verdict cycle if new drift classes surface.
Do NOT confuse legacy `g7-ea1_n*` labels with corrected `g7-ea7_n*` convention. Per no-amend doctrine.
Do NOT trust your own paraphrase. Independent disk verification on every claim; verbatim restatement from source files.
Do NOT treat Class D ("cosmetic") amendments as skippable. Per LA mature-not-minimal motto.
Do NOT begin Item 4.13.5 if Item 4.11a smoke test failed.

Do NOT execute n2(c) paste-relay carve-out at any task other than `Agents Cadence Monitor`. The paste-relay is scoped to that one S4U LogonType task only. All other 12 tasks at Item 4.7 run in-process.

ea_initiation.closing_handoff_to_la_at_stage_4_close:
On Stage 4 completion (Item 4.13.5 done), final closing handoff to LA must include (NOTE: produce as XML file at `docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE4_CLOSING.xml` OR as concise chat report, at LA discretion):
- Stage 4 commit hashes (BlarAI + devplatform + STATUS append) - Vikunja DB sha256 (pre-cutover, post-startup, +5s post-startup) - Vikunja project count post-cutover - Per-task LastTaskResult table for all 13 tasks - Bridge daemon PID + CommandLine - Item 4.11a smoke test result - Item 4.11b deferred LA manual smoke (noted for post-Stage-4 LA action) - LA pre-prep attestation summary (each prep-N reaffirmed; note prep-3 REVISED) - g8-ea8_n1 + n2 sub-clauses status (each marked SATISFIED at Item N) - Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay outcome: in-process (if elevated) OR paste-relay-completed (if non-elevated; LA pasted Unregister+Register output back; verify PASS) - rr1-rr8 status updates - f5_5 + f5_6 reaffirmed for Stage 5 - Any new A15+ anomalies recorded in BlarAI STATUS.md - Any new drift classes that surfaced beyond g8-ea8_n1 + n2 - Confirmation: 13 BlarAI scheduled tasks ENABLED + LastTaskResult=0; Vikunja running from devplatform binary; bridge daemon running from devplatform; all 3 MCP configs repointed; .vbs + .lnk rewritten; fleet UNPAUSED at devplatform state.json - Backup files created (.pre_stage4_bak): list paths for Stage 5 EA reference - Recommendation to LA: Stage 4 close triple-subagent verification (Guide-#8 spawns S1 + S2 + S3 mirroring Stage 3.10 pattern)
EA-8 STOPs after emitting closing handoff. Guide-#8 reviews + spawns triple-subagent verification + synthesizes Stage 4 close verdict. LA confirms COMPLETE. Then Stage 5 EA spawn (separate fresh-EA spawn).
